svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 241px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 120px; margin-left: 271px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 228px; margin-left: 41px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Embedded mode
Extract token from header,
decode JWT for userId

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 228px; margin-left: 461px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 10px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Standalone mode
Call auth() for NextAuth session,
extract accessToken

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 320px; margin-left: 231px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Invoke Agent Core with resolved token

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 188px; height: 1px; padding-top: 420px; margin-left: 256px;

display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 208px; height: 1px; padding-top: 538px; margin-left: 1px;

div.div:
Send tokenExpired event
to browser; parent notified
via postMessage

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 198px; height: 1px; padding-top: 538px; margin-left: 501px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;

div.div:
Call auth() again to trigger
JWT callback refresh,
retry Agent Core request
